form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 6th of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1006m, 9 len behind General Thayer with 56kg at $8.30. Previously second-up won by a nose at Canterbury Park July 26 over 1006m defeating Forsaken with 55.5kg at $2.50. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 10 over 1308m, 1.75 len behind Slew Skies with 56kg at $8.70.
